name: AstroClient
description: Astro Launcher builtin mod - PVP + Builder tools

pvp.description: Crystal aura, AutoCrystal, Reach display, CPS counter

builder.name: Builder Tools

discord.name: Discord RPC
discord.description: Shows Astro Launcher in Discord activity
